case_title: EVANS, ROBERT E. VS SAN FRANCISCO FIRE CREDIT UNION (DIANA DYKSTRA) et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, ROBERT E.
